source_name: Spatial Research District art source branch
license_summary: Candidate first-party art and spatial interaction source; not accepted as product assets until provenance, generator reproducibility, route fit, and commercial ownership are reviewed.
allowed_operations: Study role-to-art mapping, semantic object mapping, and deterministic generation ideas.
Cherry-pick or reimplement source-only semantic contracts after review.
Use isolated local builds or screenshots as non-authoritative design evidence.
Promote only original, provenance-reviewed assets through a separate asset replacement gate.
forbidden_operations: Do not merge PR #23 directly into main while it is draft, unstable, and behind current Pixel Office architecture.
Do not commit PNG asset outputs, generated asset dumps, node_modules, dist, cache, or local DB files from the source branch.
Do not let AdvancedSpatialOffice, pathfinding, art manifests, or spatial snapshots own AgentOps MIS workspace, task, run, approval, memory, artifact, evaluation, runtime event, or audit authority.
Do not replace the current Pixel Operating Map route contract without a separate first-party migration plan and UI smoke.
Do not ingest raw prompts, raw responses, credentials, tokens, private messages, full transcripts, generated exports, or customer raw documents.
runtime_requirements: No runtime required for CI acceptance.
Optional isolated UI build only after selecting a reimplementation slice.
No live Hermes/OpenClaw execution required for this packet.
product_claim_limit: AgentOps MIS has an incubator packet for the Spatial Research District art source; current main remains the authority ledger and no PR #23 art outputs or Advanced Spatial route are product-merged by this packet.
rollback_plan: Remove this packet or keep it as rejected/incubator evidence; existing Pixel Office, spatial semantic contract, run ledger, approvals, memory, evaluation, runtime event, artifact, and audit pages remain authoritative.
